title: helianthemum pilosum subsp. subobtusatum
intro: Helianthemum pilosum subsp. subobtusatum, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Cistaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Helianthemum pilosum subsp. subobtusatum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
